summary: Tested Vastgoed Kiosk redesign (Albert Heijn self-checkout style). All kiosk pages have bold orange gradient background with white floating cards. Full flow tested: Login -> Welcome -> Apartment Selection -> Tenant Overview -> Back Navigation. Admin button and Logout functionality verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kiosk redesign complete. All pages use orange gradient bg + white cards. Key test-ids: kiosk-start-btn, admin-btn, kiosk-welcome-logout, apt-{number}, total-amount, pay-btn, pay-type-{id}, payment-next-btn, confirm-payment-btn, code-ok-btn

kiosk_pages_verified.design: Orange gradient bg, white card with Start button, service icons (Huur, Service, Boetes), Admin/Logout buttons in header
Orange gradient bg, white apartment cards with tenant names and Bezet badges, mode toggle (Appt/Code)
Orange gradient bg, white card with alphanumeric keypad for tenant code entry
Orange gradient bg, white financial card (Openstaande huur, Servicekosten, Boetes), status card (Alles betaald! or Betalen button)
Orange gradient bg, white card with 4-digit PIN input and numeric keypad
Orange gradient bg, white payment options card
Orange gradient bg, white confirmation card
GREEN gradient bg, white success card with receipt preview

design_verification.orange_gradient_background: VERIFIED - All kiosk pages use bg-gradient-to-br from-orange-500 via-orange-500 to-orange-600
design_verification.white_floating_cards: VERIFIED - All content in white cards with rounded-3xl shadow-2xl
design_verification.touch_friendly_buttons: VERIFIED - Large buttons with py-4 px-6 rounded-2xl
design_verification.decorative_elements: VERIFIED - Subtle wave/shape overlays for visual interest

notes: Payment flow (KioskPaymentSelect, KioskPaymentConfirm, KioskReceipt) could not be fully tested because all tenants have 0 debt
Admin dashboard (KioskAdminDashboard) was NOT modified - it uses standard admin interface, not kiosk-style design (as expected per requirements)
Login page (CompanySelect) was NOT modified (as expected per requirements)
